OPTz
OPT record
optionsc
Initialize an OPT rdata.
        *rdclass*, an ``int`` is the rdataclass of the Rdata,
        which is also the payload size.
        *rdtype*, an ``int`` is the rdatatype of the Rdata.
        *options*, a tuple of ``bytes``
        c
